focusPoints.label: Energy levels since joining
focusPoints.reason: Notes mention a change in energy since Tom joined. Could be fatigue, disengagement, or something personal — worth exploring how he's feeling overall.

focusPoints.label: Connection with the team lately
focusPoints.reason: Tom missed the last two socials and there are hints of friction with a teammate. This could indicate a shift in team dynamics or personal connections — worth discussing.

focusPoints.label: Workload and pace of work
focusPoints.reason: PR reviews are slower and commits have thinned out. This could be a sign of overload, lack of clarity, or motivation issues — important to clarify what's affecting his pace.

focusPoints.label: Feedback on design-system PR
focusPoints.reason: There was friction on a recent PR that got heavily reworked. Understanding his perspective on the feedback received could reveal insights into his current state.

focusPoints.label: Feeling recognized for contributions
focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — common concern for juniors; worth checking if Tom feels his work is acknowledged or if he has any wins he wants to share.

name: Tom
notes: PR reviews have been taking longer than usual and commits have thinned out over the last 2-3 weeks. Was very energetic when they joined 8 months ago. Missed the last two team socials. One teammate hinted there was friction over a design-system PR that got reworked heavily. I don't want this to be a performance conversation — I want to understand what's going on.
